title: Wrong trace for a dangling signal after a multiplexer

features.name: ternary_select_with_reduction_condition
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where the select condition is derived from a reduction OR operation on an intermediate wire

features.name: function_with_casez_bus_slice_selection
features.description: Code should include a function that uses casez with wildcard patterns to select different slices of a bus based on a select signal

features.name: reduction_or_on_or_of_inverted_and_original_signal
features.description: Code should include a reduction OR operation where the operand is computed from an inverted signal OR'd with another signal

features.name: ternary_with_input_and_function_output_branches
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator selecting between a primary input and a function output, where the function itself uses casez selection
